settings.name: Haitian Vetiver
settings.body: Roots hand-harvested at 18 months, steam-distilled on-site. Darker, smokier, more complex than alternatives. Our primary anchor for woody compositions.

settings.name: Omani Frankincense
settings.body: Boswellia sacra resin, wild-harvested by Bedouin families. The finest grade — milky, sacred, with a lift of citrus that lesser resins cannot offer.

settings.name: Atlas Cedar
settings.body: Cold-pressed from sustainably managed Cedrus atlantica. Warm, dry, and pencil-shaving clean. A foundation note that carries for hours without weight.

settings.name: Tasmanian Boronia
settings.body: One of the most expensive naturals in perfumery. A singular floral-fruity note — ionone-rich, violet-adjacent, irreplaceable. Used only in our Gold series.
